00032 typedef struct {
00033     char filename[256];  /*> Filename */
00034     char *buffer; /*> address of text */
00035     char **line;  /*> table of each lines */
00036     int maxline;  /*> number of line */
00037     int wchar,hchar; /*> size of a character */
00038 } TEXT;
00039 
00040 TEXT *load_text( char *filename);
00041 void  free_text( TEXT *text);
00042
